rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single supporting reference in the Study 2 limitations section, where the authors note that product categories may differ in perceived hedonic versus utilitarian character. It is used to acknowledge a possible confound, not to build hypotheses, define the core mechanism, or guide the empirical design of the focal studies. The citing paper's main framework centers on comparison versus separation effects across promotions and brand tiers, with no direct extension or application of Dhar and Wertenbroch's theory.
